_coverage_note: JNTU-GV (Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Gurajada, Vizianagaram -- split from JNTUK in 2022) Engineering colleges: 2 constituent + 10 autonomous + 10 regular-affiliated (Private), sourced from JNTU-GV's own official academics pages (jntugv.edu.in/academics: constituent-colleges, autonomous-colleges, affliated-colleges). Pharmacy and Management/PG colleges on those pages were excluded -- Engineering only. Every college falls within JNTU-GV's six-district jurisdiction (Vizianagaram, Visakhapatnam, Srikakulam, Parvathipuram Manyam, Alluri Sitharama Raju, Anakapalli). The dedicated DAA portal (daa.jntugv.edu.in) did not resolve from this environment, so it was not used; its /constituent/ page had also been independently flagged as carrying a spam-injection page title, so the constituent colleges were taken from the clean jntugv.edu.in academics page (spam-checked -- no such signal) and cross-checked against the colleges' own official sites. branches_offered and per-college city are not yet sourced per-college.

colleges.name: JNTU-GV College of Engineering, Vizianagaram
colleges.notes: JNTU-GV constituent (university-run) engineering college -- the main campus. Confirmed from JNTU-GV's official academics/constituent-colleges page and cross-checked against the college's own site (jntugvcev.edu.in). branches_offered not yet sourced per-college.

colleges.name: JNTU-GV Tribal College of Engineering, Kurupam
colleges.notes: JNTU-GV constituent tribal engineering college at Kurupam (Parvathipuram Manyam district). Confirmed from JNTU-GV's official academics/constituent-colleges page and the college's own site (teck.jntugv.edu.in); the source lists its location as the town 'Kurupam', which is in Parvathipuram Manyam district. branches_offered not yet sourced per-college.
